name: Function Computation Systems Parameterization
description: Definition of the system parameterization FCNSY representing the computation of values of a function F with n output ports.

elements.text: FCNSY(F, n) is the system Z with SZ = RNG(F), IZ = DMN(F), OZ = RNG(F)^n, NZ(x, p) = F(p), and RZ(x) = (x, ..., x).
